name: Chocolate Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter. Pat the mixture firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and 2 1/2 inches up the sides. Chill.
2. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F.
3. In another large bowl, combine the softened cream cheese and sugar. Beat until creamy. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in the melted chocolate chips and heavy cream mixture until smooth. Set aside.
5. Pour the cheesecake batter into the prepared crust and bake at 325 degrees F for 60 minutes.
6. Turn off the oven and let it stand with the door slightly open for 1 hour.
7. Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely.
8. Chill in the refrigerator for 24 hours.
9. Spread cherry pie filling over the top of the cheesecake, leaving a 1-inch border around the edge. Decorate the rim with whipped cream if desired.
